name: Sweet Potato Pecan Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Process the cooked sweet potatoes through a vegetable ricer.
3. Beat the eggs with the sugar and butter until smooth and light.
4. Add milk (half and half), sweet potatoes, ginger, pecans, cinnamon, and salt to the egg mixture; stir well.
5. Pour the filling into the prepared pie shell.
6. Make the topping by mixing the remaining butter, flour, and brown sugar; sprinkle over the filling.
7. Bake until the top is golden brown and the pie firm (a skewer inserted in the center should emerge clean), about 40 minutes.
8. Serve with slightly sweetened whipped cream.
